timeline.label: Q3 FY2026 book $8.55/sh; Investment A 82% of equity; MIH fair value $13.9M post-IPO lockup
Synteq Digital stake received ($1.843M) from North Carolina asset sale and related-party transfer
MIAX (MIH) IPO completed; FRMO holds fair-value stake with six-month lockup
CMSG begins OTCQX trading; FRMO elects fair-value accounting
FY2025 book $7.26/sh; HKHC financials anchor royalty and equity-method marks
FRMO renamed from FRM Nexus (1993 incorporation); ongoing Horizon affiliate structure
Winland (WELX) accumulation path begins per approved Substack; control >50% remains open
SSI frictionless flywheel: step-wise HK ecosystem stakes (MIAX, HKHC, CMSG, Winland)
Permanent-capital holdco model: no fund redemptions; concentrated Horizon book

industry.structure: FRMO is a non-operating holdco; economics flow from Horizon Kinetics advisory royalties and mark-to-market stakes in exchanges, funds, and land/crypto affiliates. No product revenue; OTC liquidity is thin.
industry.share_shift: Value accrues to listed affiliates (MIAX IPO 2025, HKHC public) and pending listings (CMSG OTCQX); Investment A dominates book at ~82% of FRMO equity.
industry.trend: Mark volatility from equity securities ($574M fair value) drives reported earnings; catalyst path is affiliate re-rates and Winland operating consolidation, not shell operating margin.
